name: Danger! Feets of Strength!

desc: Equip only to a "Danger!" monster. It gains 800 ATK/DEF. It cannot be destroyed by card effects. It can make up to 2 attacks on monsters during each Battle Phase.
eff: Equip only to a "Danger!" monster. It gains 800 ATK/DEF. It cannot be destroyed by card effects. It can make up to 2 attacks on monsters during each Battle Phase.

mst: Equipped cannot be destroyed by card effects
misc: Equips only to a specific target
